title: ME3 9NQ, Medway Energy Recovery Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/DP3126SA/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Medway Energy Recovery Limited Installation name: MedwayOne Energy Hub Permit number: EPR/DP3126SA/A001  "
